name: code-change-verification
default_program:
[stages: preflight>detect>plan>verify>review>handoff>audit |
 scope: diff|repo|paths(glob,...) |
 policy: evidence,quality-gates{format,lint,typecheck,tests},deterministic-output |
 lens: kent-beck |
 output: md(contract=v1)]

required_inputs.name: CHANGE_TYPE
required_inputs.description: What kind of change was made.

required_inputs.name: VERIFICATION_POLICY
required_inputs.description: Whether to run the minimum credible stack or the full repository stack.

required_inputs.name: KNOWN_COMMAND_SOURCES
required_inputs.description: AGENTS, WORKFLOW, Makefile, package scripts, CI workflows, or repo scripts that define the verification order.
